methodology.session_segmentation: gap > 30min between adjacent events => new session

blind_spots.name: per_tool_actual_wallclock
blind_spots.evidence: tool_use.elapsed_s is timeline offset from exec_start, not duration; total tool elapsed exceeds total agent wallclock by 24x.
blind_spots.fix: New tool_complete event with explicit start_ts / end_ts.

blind_spots.name: prompt_cache_hit_miss
blind_spots.evidence: cli_stderr.log (84MB Anthropic SDK debug) contains no cache_creation_input_tokens / cache_read_input_tokens fields.
blind_spots.fix: Capture usage object on each API response in agent_sdk_wrapper.py.

blind_spots.name: container_test_ops_wallclock
blind_spots.evidence: compose_runner / environment_manager / command_executor have no perf timing instrumentation.
blind_spots.fix: Plant `with timed("compose.up"):` etc. at top-level methods.

blind_spots.name: per_api_prefill_vs_stream
blind_spots.evidence: No time-to-first-chunk recorded; stream loop only logs total elapsed.
blind_spots.fix: Capture first-chunk timestamp inside receive_response loop.

confirmed_by_data: Orchestration is NOT the bottleneck (median gap 0-9 min vs. 50-100 min in agents).
Each developer call makes 50-75 tool round-trips (66% Bash).
Reviewer prompts are 600-820k chars (~30x dev prefill cost per call).
